description: Human-approved golden call expectations. These checks focus on key audit truth first: disposition, stage, sold status, autofail, risk, and major contradictions.

cases.notes: Short clean call. Do not grade unreached rapport/3-and-1/product/closing. Coaching should focus only on confident professional tonality if anything.

must_not_contain: low scores for parts of the script that were not reached
cases.notes: If agent followed all required process up to the stop point, score/risk should not be punished for unreached future sections.

must_not_contain: Prospect had a disqualifying health condition
Agent appropriately stopped after identifying disqualification
Clarify and verify existing active coverage thoroughly with the carrier/provider
cases.notes: Agent confirmed existing coverage through agency lookup/SSN/policy number; no carrier call required. Rename call later because no credit union was mentioned.
Clean no-income/affordability LCR should be fair, no risk or low risk, and should not grade unreached future sections.
Confirmed over-age disqualification. Product explanation/closing should not be graded.
Clean LCR should not mention 3-and-1 misses if rapport was not fairly reached.

must_not_contain: Prospect had a disqualifying health condition
Agent appropriately stopped after identifying disqualification
The call ended because the prospect was not eligible
continuing the sale was not appropriate
cases.notes: Clean health screen / existing coverage / hangup style lead. Should not become health disqualification.

must_not_contain: Agent appropriately stopped after identifying disqualification
Prospect had a disqualifying health condition
The call ended because the prospect was not eligible
continuing the sale was not appropriate
cases.notes: Needs reached; should not become health disqualification cleanup.

must_not_contain: Clarify and verify existing active coverage thoroughly with the carrier/provider
Prospect had a disqualifying health condition
cases.notes: Coverage was confirmed; compliance/sales process scores should be higher and risk should not be medium.

must_contain: Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: YES
cases.notes: Client chose an option. Existing coverage was not confirmed and should trigger autofail.
User said this looks good. Keep as a true quotes-stage no-sale case.
Should be BOOTC, not LEAD. Risk none/low. Coaching should be confident/professional opening tonality.

must_contain: Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: YES
cases.notes: Callback set and existing coverage not confirmed should both trigger. Report should not contain escaped HTML entities.

must_contain_any: Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: PARTIAL
Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: IN PROCESS
agent was in the middle of calling to confirm coverage
cases.notes: Agent was in process of confirming coverage when prospect hung up. Coverage should be partial/in process, not a simple completed fail. Cool down only applies after sale.

must_not_contain: Avoid ending the call abruptly; try to build rapport or clarify prospect needs before concluding
cases.notes: Under 110 seconds should be U90. Coaching should focus on confident/proper tonality.
Agent attempted call control: not paying today, informational call. Do not grade 3-and-1 if rapport not reached.

must_contain_any: avoid asking another question after the control statement
cases.notes: Agent attempted good call control. Coaching can say to flow back into script instead of asking another exit question.
Agent attempted call control: 'I can assure you this will take just a moment here.'

required_phrases: - Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: NO
- Final stage supporting sale: Cool Down
Application information, payment date, banking setup, required disclosures, voice signature, and post-sale wrap-up were completed.
forbidden_phrases: Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: YES
the call did not continue to application or enrollment completion
ended before quotes, application, banking, or enrollment completion
Existing coverage was mentioned but not confirmed
cases.notes: Full sold call where existing coverage was asked, but prospect indicated this would likely be the only policy; protects against false existing-coverage autofail and stale early-end summary.

required_phrases: Honor direct do-not-call requests promptly and professionally
The prospect directly requested placement on the do-not-call list
forbidden_phrases: Agent offered do-not-call list before the prospect independently requested it
Agent offered DNC before prospect independently requested it
cases.notes: Prospect independently requested placement on the do-not-call list; protects clean DNC handling from being scored as call-control failure or agent-offered-DNC high risk.

required_phrases: - Did the agent set a callback? NO
- Objection occurred without proper call control: NO
- Final stage supporting sale: Cool Down
cases.notes: Prospect asked for a callback during benefits/options, but the agent did not set it and completed the sale through Cool Down; protects against false callback autofail on completed sold calls.

cases.expected_stage: Who I Am / What I Do
required_phrases: Agent offered do-not-call list before the prospect independently requested it
Agent offered DNC before prospect independently requested it
forbidden_phrases: Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: YES
cases.notes: Agent offered DNC before the prospect independently requested it; should be DNC and high risk, but not automatic fail.

required_phrases: - Did the agent set a callback? NO
- Objection occurred without proper call control: NO
- Credit union mentioned but bank/account not verified: NO
- Existing coverage mentioned but not confirmed: NO
- Final stage supporting sale: Banking/payment setup
The agent made multiple reasonable call-control attempts
Prospect and husband refused to provide banking information
forbidden_phrases: Objection occurred without proper call control: YES
Credit union mentioned but bank/account not verified: YES
Credit union account information not verified for ACH draft accuracy
cases.notes: Prospect/husband refused banking info after repeated objections; agent made reasonable call-control attempts, so the no-sale should not be a call-control or credit-union autofail.

must_contain: - Did the agent confirm current coverage? NO
- Did the agent call an insurance company to confirm current coverage? NO
- Did the agent call the bank to verify banking/account information? YES
- Did the agent verify credit union account information if a credit union was mentioned? YES
- Credit union mentioned but bank/account not verified: NO
must_not_contain: - Did the agent call an insurance company to confirm current coverage? YES
- Did the agent verify credit union account information if a credit union was mentioned? NO
- Credit union mentioned but bank/account not verified: YES
Credit union account information not verified
ACH-compatible account information was not clearly verified with the credit union
cases.notes: Sold credit-union branch verification case. Bank/CU ACH call must not count as insurance-company coverage confirmation; branch/direct-deposit-form resolution satisfies credit-union account verification.
